research.valueProp: Gym Launch is a business consulting and digital marketing agency built specifically to help Gyms and Studios grow their memberships, revenue and profit.
research.idealCustomerProfile: Independent gyms and boutique studios looking to grow membership, revenue, and profitability through proven sales and marketing playbooks.
research.archetypeRationale: GymLaunch's motion is consulting + marketing services that drive demand into ABC's gym customers — classic Go-To-Market lift via co-selling and joint demand gen.
research.scope: Joint demand gen with Glofox + Ignite gym customers, co-branded campaigns, and shared playbooks for membership growth.
research.competitiveLandscape: Other gym-focused agencies exist, but GymLaunch's track record and depth in the fitness vertical is differentiated.

research.valueProp: YR will integrate with Glofox & Ignite allowing customers to seamlessly offer Your Reformer machine bookings, check-ins and class booking data through their preferred ABC platform.
research.idealCustomerProfile: Pilates and reformer studios on Glofox or Ignite that want a unified experience for machine bookings, attendance, and class scheduling.
research.archetypeRationale: Your Reformer extends ABC's reach into the reformer Pilates segment via a hardware-aware integration — a Channel motion that opens a new buyer surface.
research.scope: Phase 1: Glofox integration for reformer bookings + check-ins. Phase 2: Ignite parity and class booking analytics.
research.competitiveLandscape: Few hardware-integrated reformer partners with native Glofox/Ignite support — strong defensibility.
riskFlags: Hardware/firmware compatibility matrix to be confirmed

milestones.name: Kickoff & technical scoping
milestones.description: Joint kickoff with ABC + partner eng. Lock down API surface, auth, environments.

milestones.name: Build & sandbox certification
milestones.description: Partner builds against sandbox; ABC certifies happy-path + edge cases.

milestones.name: Beta with anchor customers
milestones.description: 2–3 anchor customers in beta. Capture quotes for launch comms.

milestones.name: Launch readiness review
milestones.description: Cross-functional review: Sales, CS, Marketing, Support. Go/no-go.

communications.title: Coming Soon
communications.subject: Coming soon: Your Reformer × ABC
communications.body:
We are excited to introduce our newest Channel Partnership, **Your Reformer**. Here's some key details to be aware of.

**Why it Matters**
YR will integrate with Glofox & Ignite allowing customers to seamlessly offer Your Reformer machine bookings, check-ins and class booking data through their preferred ABC platform. They offer best-in-class support and preferred pricing for ABC customers.

**Who it's for**
This will be available for Glofox clients initially and for Ignite clients later (Q4). Pilates and reformer studios on Glofox or Ignite that want a unified experience for machine bookings, attendance, and class scheduling.

**Key Dates**
- Glofox Pilot: June 18, 2026
- Glofox Start Sell: June 28, 2026
- Ignite: TBD (Q4)

**Prepare for Launch**
Your full Launch Readiness packet will drop 2 weeks before your finalized start sell date. Additional details will be posted here. Stay tuned!

communications.title: Prepare for Launch
communications.subject: Get ready: Your Reformer × ABC launches June 28, 2026
communications.body:
## Prepare for launch: Your Reformer × ABC

We launch in one week. Use this packet to get fully ready.

**Integration overview (from partner)**
Integration details to be confirmed with partner.

**What's attached**
- Process Guide — how to position, qualify, and hand off
- Integration Guide — technical reference for solutions and support
- FAQ — top 10 questions with crisp answers
- Internal Talk Tracks — for AEs, CSMs, and support

**Action items**
- AEs: review the talk track and the ICP one-liner.
- CS: review the integration guide; flag accounts already asking for this.
- Support: scan the FAQ; ping us with anything unclear before launch day.

Questions? Reply here.

communications.title: New Partner is Live
communications.subject: Your Reformer × ABC is live
communications.body:
## Your Reformer × ABC is live

The integration is live as of today.

**The short pitch**
YR will integrate with Glofox & Ignite allowing customers to seamlessly offer Your Reformer machine bookings, check-ins and class booking data through their preferred ABC platform.

**Resources (all in one place)**
- Customer-facing deck
- External one-pager
- All internal templates (process, integration, FAQ, talk tracks)

**Who to route to**
- Active opportunities: AEs can lead with the joint value prop on accounts that fit the ICP.
- Existing customers: CS team has a target list of accounts already showing intent signals.

We'll share a 30-day readout with metrics and customer stories. Until then — go sell it.

research.valueProp: Pipe is a capital provider that ABC Fitness Solutions, LLC has partnered with to launch ABC Capital and is not otherwise affiliated with ABC Fitness Solutions, LLC.
research.idealCustomerProfile: ABC gym and studio customers seeking working capital and growth financing through ABC Capital.
research.archetypeRationale: Pipe powers the ABC Capital platform offering — a Platform partnership that adds a financial services surface inside ABC's product.
research.scope: Launch ABC Capital, joint underwriting flow, and in-product offers for eligible ABC customers.
research.competitiveLandscape: Embedded capital providers exist; Pipe differentiates on speed, pricing, and developer-grade APIs.
riskFlags: Compliance and disclosure language pending legal review

internalAwareness.subject: [Partnerships] Pipe — Platform partner under internal review
internalAwareness.body:
## Overview
Pipe is in internal review as a Platform partner powering **ABC Capital** for ABC Fitness Solutions customers.

## Value Prop
Working capital + growth financing inside ABC, underwritten and funded by Pipe.

## Disclosure
Pipe is the capital provider that ABC has partnered with to launch ABC Capital and is not otherwise affiliated with ABC Fitness Solutions, LLC.

research.valueProp: Ganter is a leading global provider of Access Control Software. They are building a custom integration purpose built for the fitness industry.
research.idealCustomerProfile: This is for clients or prospects actively seeking a new door access solution or new clubs/studios that will need door access as they prepare for opening.
research.archetypeRationale: Gantner extends ABC's platform with hardware-grade access control — a Platform partnership that deepens the operational surface inside Glofox and Ignite.
research.scope: Phase 1: Glofox integration for access control + locker management. Phase 2: Ignite parity and analytics.
research.competitiveLandscape: Multiple access-control vendors; Gantner's global footprint and fitness-industry focus differentiate.
riskFlags: Hardware certification matrix and field upgrade plan TBD

research.valueProp: Many gyms offer HYROX training classes that prepare members for HYROX competitions. ABC will deliver HYROX video training content through the Glofox and Ignite apps so members can follow HYROX workouts in the gym, not just in classes.
research.idealCustomerProfile: Gyms and studios on Glofox or Ignite running HYROX-style functional fitness programming whose members want to train for HYROX events year-round.
research.archetypeRationale: HYROX provides training content delivered through ABC apps — a Data Affiliate motion centered on content syndication, member engagement, and adoption.
research.scope: Deliver HYROX video training in Glofox + Ignite apps; track engagement and member conversion to HYROX events.
research.competitiveLandscape: Other branded fitness content libraries exist, but HYROX's tie-in to a global competition format is uniquely sticky.
riskFlags: Content licensing scope and territory rights to be finalized

internalAwareness.subject: [Partnerships] HYROX — Data Affiliate under internal review
internalAwareness.body:
## Overview
HYROX is in internal review as a Data Affiliate partner. ABC will deliver HYROX video training content through the Glofox and Ignite apps.

## Value Prop
Members can follow HYROX workouts in the gym between classes, deepening engagement and feeding the HYROX competition funnel.

## What to expect next
Legal review of content licensing; partner intake chat to follow.

research.valueProp: Replify AI provides value by acting as a 24/7 virtual team member that automates lead capture, appointment booking, and member inquiries across phone, text, and email.
research.idealCustomerProfile: Gyms and studios that want to capture more leads after-hours and reduce no-shows by automating the front-desk conversation across phone, text, and email.
research.archetypeRationale: Replify slots into ABC as an always-on AI front-desk layer — a Platform partnership that extends booking, lead capture, and member service inside Glofox and Ignite.
research.scope: Phase 1: lead capture + appointment booking integration. Phase 2: member inquiry routing and analytics.
research.competitiveLandscape: Generic AI receptionists exist; Replify wins on fitness-vertical context and native ABC booking integration.
riskFlags: PII handling and call recording compliance to be confirmed per region

internalAwareness.subject: [Partnerships] Replify — Platform partner in partner chat
internalAwareness.body:
## Overview
Replify is in the partner chat stage. They will act as a 24/7 virtual team member automating lead capture, appointment booking, and member inquiries across phone, text, and email.

## Partner Archetype — Platform
Native integration with ABC booking + member surfaces.

## What to expect next
Intake chat in motion; integration scope and target date to be confirmed.

messages.content:
Hi Replify team 👋

I'm ABC's Partner Launch Agent. Congrats on signing — I'll help us go from "signed" to "live" cleanly.

Could you review the brief and share anything you'd change, add, or want our team to know?

Thanks — got it. ✅

Next, can you walk me through the **integration**? A short description is perfect, and if you have an integration / API doc, please attach it.

research.valueProp: HCL accelerates go-to-market and operations teams workflows with workflow automation that adapts to context. Integrated with ABC, joint customers get a unified path from trigger event to action taken, reducing manual reconciliation and shrinking time-to-value by an estimated 30–40%.
research.idealCustomerProfile: Mid-market and upper-mid-market go-to-market and operations teams (200–5,000 employees) running a modern SaaS stack with at least one system of record. Strong fit for teams with a dedicated operations or platform lead who already operate on a modern data stack and need context-switching across point tools resolved.
research.archetypeRationale: HCL's value lands inside the product through a technical integration, driving stickiness and retention on mutual customers. Sales motion is integration-first, monetization typically via API fee.
research.scope: Phase 1 (60 days): production-grade API integration with ABC, joint co-marketing landing page, and one anchor customer reference. Phase 2 (post-launch): expanded hcl↔ABC sync surface, in-product cross-promotion, and quarterly business reviews.
research.competitiveLandscape: HCL sits alongside a small set of point solutions but differentiates through an opinionated, outcome-led experience. ABC's partnership tightens the seam between trigger event and action taken, an area where competitors still rely on manual exports.
riskFlags: Integration ownership and SLA not yet confirmed
Need security review for any data sharing in scope
Confirm legal/contract path before public co-marketing

internalAwareness.subject: [Partnerships] We've signed HCL — Data Affiliate
internalAwareness.body:
## Overview
We've signed **HCL** ([hcl.com](https://hcl.com)) as a new Data Affiliate partner. The integration moves into onboarding this week with primary contact **HENRY** (henry@gmail.com).

## Value Prop
HCL accelerates go-to-market and operations teams workflows with workflow automation that adapts to context. Integrated with ABC, joint customers get a unified path from trigger event to action taken, reducing manual reconciliation and shrinking time-to-value by an estimated 30–40%.

## Ideal Customer Profile
Mid-market and upper-mid-market go-to-market and operations teams (200–5,000 employees) running a modern SaaS stack with at least one system of record. Strong fit for teams with a dedicated operations or platform lead who already operate on a modern data stack and need context-switching across point tools resolved.

## Partner Archetype — Data Affiliate
HCL's value lands inside the product through a technical integration, driving stickiness and retention on mutual customers. Sales motion is integration-first, monetization typically via API fee.

## Scope
Phase 1 (60 days): production-grade API integration with ABC, joint co-marketing landing page, and one anchor customer reference. Phase 2 (post-launch): expanded hcl↔ABC sync surface, in-product cross-promotion, and quarterly business reviews.

## What to expect next
- Partner-facing launch chat goes out today; we'll capture integration details, target launch date, and any partner-supplied collateral.
- The agent will follow up if the partner is unresponsive at 10 / 20 / 30 days and notify this team.
- Once the partner closes the chat, we'll publish a launch timeline with three communications (Coming Soon, Prepare for Launch, Live) plus customer-facing collateral.

Reply here with edits or call out blockers before we hit "Approve & Launch to Partner".

messages.content:
Hi HENRY 👋

I'm ABC's Partner Launch Agent. Congrats on signing with ABC — I'll help us go from "signed" to "live" cleanly.

Here's the brief our team put together about **HCL** so far:

**Value Prop**
HCL accelerates go-to-market and operations teams workflows with workflow automation that adapts to context. Integrated with ABC, joint customers get a unified path from trigger event to action taken, reducing manual reconciliation and shrinking time-to-value by an estimated 30–40%.

**Ideal Customer Profile**
Mid-market and upper-mid-market go-to-market and operations teams (200–5,000 employees) running a modern SaaS stack with at least one system of record. Strong fit for teams with a dedicated operations or platform lead who already operate on a modern data stack and need context-switching across point tools resolved.

**Scope**
Phase 1 (60 days): production-grade API integration with ABC, joint co-marketing landing page, and one anchor customer reference. Phase 2 (post-launch): expanded hcl↔ABC sync surface, in-product cross-promotion, and quarterly business reviews.

Could you review the above and share anything you'd change, add, or want our team to know? Even a quick "looks good" is great.
